text: ‘I have redeemed my pledge’, or perhaps ‘I have kept the faith’, but the context here seems to demand a fresh metaphor; cf. I Tim. 6.20, II Tim. 1.12.
There is no means of determining whether this is the Alexander mentioned in Ac. 19.33.
According to Eusebius, this is the same Linus who became bishop of Rome after the death of St Peter.
